title: Coordinate work site activities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate work site activities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work site activities

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify personnel, equipment and material resource requirements according to the scope of the project and supervisor instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify personnel, equipment and material resource requirements according to the scope of the project and supervisor instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document the order of activities and time allocation, and present to the supervisor for verification.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the environmental implications of the proposed work site activities, assess the likely outcomes and report to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
